Package neqsim.process.processmodel

Class JsonProcessExporter

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.processmodel.JsonProcessExporter
public class JsonProcessExporter extends Object
Exports a ProcessSystem to the JSON schema consumed by JsonProcessBuilder.

The exported JSON is round-trippable: ProcessSystem -> toJson() -> JsonProcessBuilder -> ProcessSystem. Streams are serialized first, followed by equipment in topological order. Each equipment unit references its inlet stream(s) by name using dot-notation for specific outlet ports (e.g. "HP Sep.gasOut").

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Method Details

    • toJson

      public String toJson(ProcessSystem process)
      Exports a ProcessSystem to a JSON string that can be consumed by JsonProcessBuilder.build(String).
      Parameters:
      process - the process system to export
      Returns:
      JSON string in the JsonProcessBuilder schema

    • toJson

      public String toJson(ProcessSystem process, boolean prettyPrint)
      Exports a ProcessSystem to a JSON string.
      Parameters:
      process - the process system to export
      prettyPrint - whether to format the JSON with indentation
      Returns:
      JSON string in the JsonProcessBuilder schema

    • toJsonObject

      public com.google.gson.JsonObject toJsonObject(ProcessSystem process)
      Exports a ProcessSystem to a JsonObject.
      Parameters:
      process - the process system to export
      Returns:
      JsonObject in the JsonProcessBuilder schema

    • buildStreamRefMap

      private void buildStreamRefMap(List<ProcessEquipmentInterface> units)
      Builds a mapping from stream object identity to string reference. Feed streams (top-level Stream objects) map to their name. Outlet streams from equipment map to "equipmentName.portName".
      Parameters:
      units - the ordered list of unit operations

    • registerExternalInletStreams

      private List<StreamInterface> registerExternalInletStreams(List<ProcessEquipmentInterface> units)
      Registers inlet streams that are not produced by, or explicitly added to, the exported process.

      Multi-area ProcessModels often share stream objects between ProcessSystem instances. When an area is exported independently, those shared input streams have no local producer and would otherwise become blank or unresolved inlet references in JSON. This method assigns each external stream a synthetic boundary stream name and stores it in streamRefMap, allowing downstream equipment to wire to an explicit feed stream after JSON import.

      Parameters:
      units - process units being exported
      Returns:
      external inlet streams in deterministic export order

    • getInletStreams

      private List<StreamInterface> getInletStreams(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Gets the inlet streams for an equipment unit with a reflection fallback for legacy equipment.
      Parameters:
      unit - equipment unit to inspect
      Returns:
      list of non-null inlet streams, possibly empty

    • uniqueBoundaryStreamName

      private String uniqueBoundaryStreamName(StreamInterface stream, Map<String,Boolean> usedNames)
      Creates a unique synthetic boundary stream name for an external inlet stream.
      Parameters:
      stream - external inlet stream
      usedNames - names already used in the exported process
      Returns:
      unique boundary stream name safe for dot-notation references

    • exportBoundaryFluids

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportBoundaryFluids(List<StreamInterface> boundaryStreams)
      Exports named fluids for all materialized boundary streams.
      Parameters:
      boundaryStreams - external inlet streams to export
      Returns:
      JSON object containing one named fluid per boundary stream

    • registerStreamUnitFluids

      private void registerStreamUnitFluids(List<ProcessEquipmentInterface> units)
      Registers named fluid references for explicit stream units.
      Parameters:
      units - process units to inspect

    • exportStreamUnitFluids

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportStreamUnitFluids(List<ProcessEquipmentInterface> units)
      Exports named fluids for explicit stream units.
      Parameters:
      units - process units to inspect
      Returns:
      JSON object containing one named fluid per stream unit

    • sanitizeFluidReference

      private String sanitizeFluidReference(String name)
      Sanitizes a stream name for use as a named-fluid key.
      Parameters:
      name - stream name to sanitize
      Returns:
      sanitized fluid-reference base name

    • makeUniqueFluidReference

      private String makeUniqueFluidReference(String baseRef, Map<String,Boolean> usedRefs)
      Makes a unique fluid-reference key.
      Parameters:
      baseRef - preferred fluid-reference key
      usedRefs - map of already-used keys
      Returns:
      unique fluid-reference key

    • exportBoundaryStream

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportBoundaryStream(StreamInterface boundaryStream)
      Exports a materialized boundary stream unit for an external inlet stream.
      Parameters:
      boundaryStream - external inlet stream to export as a local stream
      Returns:
      stream JSON definition, or null if the stream was not registered

    • getStreamReference

      public String getStreamReference(StreamInterface stream)
      Gets the JSON stream reference assigned to a stream during the most recent export.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream object to look up
      Returns:
      JSON reference such as feed, HP Sep.gasOut, or null when the stream was not part of the most recent export

    • mapOutletStreams

      private void mapOutletStreams(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Maps outlet streams of an equipment unit to their reference strings.
      Parameters:
      unit - the equipment unit

    • findFeedFluid

      private SystemInterface findFeedFluid(List<ProcessEquipmentInterface> units)
      Finds the first feed stream's fluid for the fluid section.
      Parameters:
      units - the ordered list of unit operations
      Returns:
      the fluid from the first Stream, or null

    • exportFluid

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
      Exports a fluid (SystemInterface) to a JSON object matching the JsonProcessBuilder schema.

      For characterized (TBP/plus) fractions, exports critical properties (Tc, Pc, acentric factor, molar mass, density) so the fluid can be reconstructed without the original E300/PVT source file. Binary interaction parameters (BICs) are exported when any non-zero value is present.

      Parameters:
      fluid - the fluid to export
      Returns:
      JsonObject with model, temperature, pressure, mixingRule, components, and optionally characterizedComponents and binaryInteractionParameters

    • exportComponentProperties

      private com.google.gson.JsonArray exportComponentProperties(SystemInterface fluid)
      Exports component-level property overrides for all components in a fluid.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the fluid system to export
      Returns:
      component property definitions for rebuilding E300-like fluids

    • exportComponentProperties

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportComponentProperties(ComponentInterface component)
      Exports component-level properties that are not preserved by component name and composition alone.
      Parameters:
      component - the component to export
      Returns:
      a JSON object with component properties

    • addFiniteProperty

      private void addFiniteProperty(com.google.gson.JsonObject json, String name, double value)
      Adds a numeric property when the value can be represented in standard JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - the object to update
      name - the property name
      value - the property value

    • exportBinaryInteractionParameters

      private void exportBinaryInteractionParameters(com.google.gson.JsonObject fluidJson, SystemInterface fluid)
      Exports binary interaction parameters (kij) from the fluid's mixing rule. Only exports non-zero BICs to keep the JSON compact. The builder uses these to override the default database BICs when reconstructing the fluid.
      Parameters:
      fluidJson - the fluid JSON object to add BICs to
      fluid - the fluid system

    • mapModelName

      private String mapModelName(String modelName)
      Maps internal NeqSim model names to the short identifiers used by JsonProcessBuilder.
      Parameters:
      modelName - the internal model name (e.g. "SRK-EOS")
      Returns:
      short identifier (e.g. "SRK")

    • exportUnit

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportUnit(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Exports a single equipment unit to a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      unit - the equipment to export
      Returns:
      JsonObject describing the unit, or null if the unit should be skipped

    • getTypeName

      private String getTypeName(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Gets the type name string for an equipment unit matching the JsonProcessBuilder type names.
      Parameters:
      unit - the equipment
      Returns:
      the type name string

    • exportStreamProperties

      private void exportStreamProperties(com.google.gson.JsonObject json, StreamInterface stream)
      Exports Stream-specific properties: flowRate, temperature, pressure.
      Parameters:
      json - the unit JSON object to populate
      stream - the stream to export

    • exportStreamProperties

      private void exportStreamProperties(com.google.gson.JsonObject json, StreamInterface stream, boolean includeZeroValues)
      Exports Stream-specific properties: flowRate, temperature, pressure.
      Parameters:
      json - the unit JSON object to populate
      stream - the stream to export
      includeZeroValues - true to include zero-valued state fields for boundary streams

    • exportMixerInlets

      private void exportMixerInlets(com.google.gson.JsonObject json, Mixer mixer)
      Exports Mixer inlets as an "inlets" array.
      Parameters:
      json - the unit JSON object
      mixer - the mixer

    • exportManifoldInlets

      private void exportManifoldInlets(com.google.gson.JsonObject json, Manifold manifold)
      Exports Manifold inlets as an "inlets" array.
      Parameters:
      json - the unit JSON object
      manifold - the manifold

    • exportHeatExchangerInlets

      private void exportHeatExchangerInlets(com.google.gson.JsonObject json, HeatExchanger hx)
      Exports HeatExchanger inlets as an "inlets" array (shell-side + tube-side).
      Parameters:
      json - the unit JSON object
      hx - the heat exchanger

    • exportProperties

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportProperties(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Exports equipment-specific design properties (outlet pressure, efficiency, split factors etc.).
      Parameters:
      unit - the equipment
      Returns:
      JsonObject with properties, or null if no properties to export

    • exportCompressorChart

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportCompressorChart(Compressor compressor)
      Exports compressor chart settings and curve arrays.
      Parameters:
      compressor - the compressor containing the chart
      Returns:
      chart settings, speed curves, and boundary curves

    • exportCompressorDriver

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportCompressorDriver(CompressorDriver driver)
      Exports compressor driver settings and max-power curves.
      Parameters:
      driver - the compressor driver to export
      Returns:
      JSON object with driver settings, or an empty object when no driver is configured

    • exportBoundaryCurve

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportBoundaryCurve(BoundaryCurve curve)
      Exports a compressor boundary curve.
      Parameters:
      curve - the boundary curve to export
      Returns:
      JSON object with active state, flow values, and head values

    • exportAntiSurge

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportAntiSurge(AntiSurge antiSurge)
      Exports anti-surge controller settings.
      Parameters:
      antiSurge - the anti-surge controller
      Returns:
      JSON object with controller settings

    • exportCalculatorProperties

      private com.google.gson.JsonObject exportCalculatorProperties(Calculator calculator)
      Exports calculator equipment references.
      Parameters:
      calculator - the calculator to export
      Returns:
      JSON object with input and output equipment names

    • toJsonArray

      private com.google.gson.JsonArray toJsonArray(double[] values)
      Converts a double array to a JSON array.
      Parameters:
      values - values to convert
      Returns:
      JSON array containing the same values

    • toJsonMatrix

      private com.google.gson.JsonArray toJsonMatrix(double[][] values)
      Converts a double matrix to a JSON array of arrays.
      Parameters:
      values - matrix values to convert
      Returns:
      JSON matrix containing the same values
